---
name: Task / Other
about: General project tasks, documentation, or maintenance.
title: "[TASK] "
labels: task

**Description**
What needs to be done?

**Checklist**
- [ ] Sub-task 1
- [ ] Sub-task 2

**Impact**
How does this change affect the project? (e.g., improves performance, updates docs)

**Notes**
Any extra information or links.
